/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/cryptum.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cryptum.dir/src/menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cryptum.dir/src/plugins_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cryptum.dir/src/crypto_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cryptum.dir/src/file_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cryptum.dir/src/text_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cryptum.dir/src/file_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cryptum.dir/src/key_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cryptum.dir/src/utils.cpp.o -o /home/ushaneva/Документы/prog/RGR/bin/cryptum  -ldl
